title: Pendant design
brief: Hi, I'm looking for a Jewelry CAD Designer experienced in Rhino 3D / MatrixGold. I have a finalized custom pendant design with detailed blueprints and specifications. The piece includes: • Sterling Silver 925 • Opening double doors • Hidden hinges • Ruby locking element • Islamic geometric openwork • Arabic calligraphy engravings I need: • .3DM file • STL file • Production-ready model Can you share similar work, estimated cost, and timeline? Thanks, Shady
